prompt_desc: For games or meetings, please set your Microphone Input Device to:
tutorial_desc:
Ensure your phone and PC are on the same Wi-Fi.
Visit this URL on your phone:
state_click_resume: Click the speaker above to unmute
install_desc_init:
Downloading and configuring the virtual audio cable for the first run.
This will take about 10 - 20 seconds.
uninstall_desc_doing: Cleaning up underlying audio routing, please wait...
uninstall_desc_success:
A system restart is recommended later to clean up registry remnants.

The program will now exit safely...
uninstall_desc_lost: Connection to the core service has been lost. Please close the window manually.
uninstall_dialog_text:
After uninstalling, ZeroMic will no longer be able to route the phone's sound to other software (such as games/voice applications).

The uninstallation process takes about 2-3 seconds, and it is recommended to restart the computer later to thoroughly clean up any residues.
reminder_desc:
The virtual audio cable has been configured!

Windows may have automatically switched your Default Playback Device to CABLE Input, causing your PC to temporarily lose sound.
Please click the speaker icon 🔊 in the bottom right corner of your screen and manually switch back to your original speaker.
m_alert_desc: Please allow browser access to the microphone.
